column1: Supplementary Table S7: Relative Synonymous Codon Usage (RSCU) comparison between Authenticated ASVs (n = 8

For each sense codon: Auth_mean_RSCU = mean RSCU in Authenticated ASVs; NUMT_mean_RSCU = mean RSCU in putative NUMTs; delta_RSCU = NUMT - Auth (positive = higher in NUMTs); p_value = Mann-Whitney U test p-value; p_adjusted_BH = Benjamini-Hochberg adjusted p-value; significant = TRUE if BH-adjusted p < 0.05.
